title: A couple of minor stats improvements for FreeBSD

comments.body: [NON-BLOCKING] Packit jobs failed. @containers/packit-build please check. Everyone else, feel free to ignore.
Adding no new tests because we don't presently have a FreeBSD suite beyond basic compile testing
